parsing_approach: Real XML parse via xml.sax with a locator, so each <dependency> block carries its actual line span. Tracks the element stack to take only direct project dependencies (not dependencyManagement, not plugin dependencies). External entity and DTD resolution disabled.
extracts: BuildModule node with groupId/version/packaging from the project coordinates
Dependency node per direct <dependency> with group/artifact/version/scope and the block's line span
declares edge file → module, depends-on edges module → dependencies
known_limitations: Single-POM view: parent POM resolution, property interpolation (${...}) and dependencyManagement version inheritance are not performed.
Plugins, profiles, and repositories are not extracted.
SAX locator lines point at the end of the start tag; multi-line <dependency ...> start tags shift the span start to the closing line.
